name: The Freak Circus
description:
Heheheh..

"Yet again, it is I, the great Jester. At your service, of course..~ Ow- HEY! LET GO OF MY HAT!!"

"HAHAH! GET HARLEQUINNED! HAHAHAHAH- OUCH!"

"Idiots, you're going to scare the visitors!"

"Awee, is the big bad Pierrot protecting the Jester? How.. kawaii."

"EH?!- HEY, SHUT UP!"

"HAHAA! Oh my God you fall for it every time!"

"Harlequin. Shut up or I'll punch your face harder than from earlier."

"Harlequin. Back away from Pierrot."

"Okay I'm sorry.."

"You guys need to take a chill pill, like seriously.."

I love doing dialogue texts that I thought of in the description lol

⚠️❗❗Not my art❗❗⚠️

Anyways enjoy!!
creator: Shedletsky!!
